package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_contains_vs_index: `strings.Index(s, sub) != -1` or `strings.Index(s, sub) >= 0` patterns
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario652Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.Contains(haystack, needle)
}
